data.body:
## Description
Delete ROLLBACK-PROCEDURE.md and clean up the tk wrapper references in ticket-cli-reference.md.

## TDD Requirement
After completing T1 (bbfb-ce09), test_rollback_procedure_deleted and test_no_tk_* tests must pass GREEN for this file group.

## Implementation Steps
1. Delete plugins/dso/docs/ROLLBACK-PROCEDURE.md (git rm)
2. In plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md:
   a. Remove the 'the tk wrapper: `tk <subcommand>`' row from the Overview table (lines ~12)
   b. Update '### `sync`' section: change 'Synchronize tickets with Jira (via the tk wrapper).' to 'Synchronize tickets with Jira.'
   c. In sync section body: replace '`sync` is a tk wrapper command (not a `ticket` dispatcher subcommand).' with '`sync` routes through the bridge scripts (`bridge-outbound.py`/`bridge-inbound.py`) — not through the deprecated tk wrapper.'
   d. In '### `archive`' section: remove 'it is distinct from the tk move-to-archive-directory operation used by the legacy markdown ticket system.' (end of the first paragraph)

## File Impact
- REMOVE: plugins/dso/docs/ROLLBACK-PROCEDURE.md
- EDIT: plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md

## test-exempt justification
test-exempt: no conditional logic — this task is infrastructure-boundary-only (doc deletions and text edits); any test would be a change-detector test asserting the content exists, not that it behaves correctly. Regression verified by RED test task (bbfb-ce09).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] ROLLBACK-PROCEDURE.md no longer exists
  Verify: ! test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/ROLLBACK-PROCEDURE.md
- [ ] ticket-cli-reference.md has no 'the tk wrapper: `tk' row
  Verify: ! grep -q 'the tk wrapper: `tk' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md
- [ ] ticket-cli-reference.md sync section has no 'via the tk wrapper'
  Verify: ! grep -q 'via the tk wrapper' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md
- [ ] ticket-cli-reference.md archive section has no 'tk move-to-archive-directory'
  Verify: ! grep -q 'tk move-to-archive-directory' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md
- [ ] bash tests/scripts/test-v2-docs-cleanup.sh passes for the relevant test functions
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-v2-docs-cleanup.sh 2>&1 | grep -E 'test_rollback_procedure_deleted.*PASS|test_no_tk.*cli_reference.*PASS'
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
